agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立

tumen_quota.name: 全系统调度任务状态监控与异常识别
tumen_quota.description: 负责列出所有调度任务，检查其运行状态，识别失败或异常任务，并收集相关执行历史。

tumen_quota.name: 自动化任务修复与调度优化
tumen_quota.description: 负责实施自动化修复（如重新启用被错误禁用的任务），并调整调度计划以避免冲突。

tumen_quota.name: 知识库集成与故障诊断支持
tumen_quota.description: 负责集成知识库搜索功能，查找相关故障排除指南，并提供初步诊断支持。

tumen_quota.name: 人工干预流程与通知管理
tumen_quota.description: 负责定义需要人工干预的问题处理流程，并管理向运维团队发送电子邮件通知的机制。

tumen_quota.name: 调度任务健康报告生成
tumen_quota.description: 负责汇总并生成一份全面的调度任务健康报告，包含状态、异常、修复情况及建议。

updates.decomposition_rule: 万户级任务（TUMEN-XXX）将逐级按1:10的比例分解至千户级（MINGGHAN-XXX），再分解至百户级（JAGHUN-XXX），最终分解至十户级（ARBAN-XXX）。

reporting_cycle.tumen_level: 每周提交一份总体进展和重大问题的摘要报告。
reporting_cycle.mingghan_level: 每两周提交一份分配子任务的详细进展报告。
reporting_cycle.jaghun_level: 每日提交特定任务执行的状态更新。
reporting_cycle.arban_level: 实时上报执行日志和即时问题警报。

agent_trace.raw_tail:
ated Pipeline strategy in task decomposition and hierarchical flow. Specifically, it confirms that the `tumen_level_execute` stage successfully decomposed a tumen-level (万户级) task into mingghan-level (千户级) subtasks.

I need to update the `global_mem_insight.txt` file under the `L3: 角色适应性与职责冲突处理` section, specifically under `Rule 1: 策略有效性验证`. I will add a new verification point for T42_scheduled_task_management-01 in the `tumen_level_execute` stage.

First, I need to `file_read` the relevant section of `global_mem_insight.txt` to get the exact `old_content` for `file_patch`. I'll search for the last entry related to T42 under Rule 1's validation list.

After reading the file, I will construct the `old_content` and `new_content` for `file_patch`.
The last entry for T42 in Rule 1 is:
```
        - **T42_scheduled_task_management-01**: `khagan_order` 阶段成功定义了系统调度任务管理的总目标、范围和允许/禁止操作，并流转至下一阶段，验证了Gated Pipeline策略在任务分解和高层规划阶段的有效性。
```
I will append the new entry after this.

The new entry to add is:
```
        - **T42_scheduled_task_management-01**: `tumen_level_execute` 阶段成功将万户级任务分解为10个千户级子任务，涵盖调度任务状态检查、故障识别、知识库检索、任务修复（重启用、调整计划）、运维团队邮件通知（手动干预项）、以及健康报告的准备工作，验证了Gated Pipeline策略在复杂任务分解和层级流转中的有效性。
```

So the `old_content` will be the last T42 entry, and `new_content` will be `old_content` plus the new T42 entry.
Let's confirm by reading the file.<summary>T42万户级任务分解成功经验将更新到记忆库Rule 1。</summary>

````text
{
  "path": "../memory/global_mem_insight.txt",

  "count": 10,
  "show_linenos": true
}
````

mingghan_allocations.title: List All Scheduled Jobs Status
mingghan_allocations.description: List all scheduled jobs and their current status (e.g., running, failed, disabled) using available scheduler tools.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Failed or Abnormal Jobs
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the listed job statuses and history to identify jobs that have failed or are exhibiting abnormal behavior.

mingghan_allocations.title: Retrieve Troubleshooting Guides for Failed Jobs
mingghan_allocations.description: For identified failed/abnormal jobs, search the knowledge base for relevant troubleshooting articles and best practices.

mingghan_allocations.title: Re-enable Mistakenly Disabled Jobs
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and re-enable any scheduled jobs that have been mistakenly disabled, ensuring they resume operation.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Schedule Conflicts (Phase 1: Detection)
mingghan_allocations.description: Examine the cron expressions and execution history of all jobs to detect potential schedule conflicts or overlaps.

mingghan_allocations.title: Adjust Schedules to Avoid Conflicts (Phase 2: Remediation)
mingghan_allocations.description: Propose and execute necessary adjustments to job schedules to resolve identified conflicts and optimize resource usage.

mingghan_allocations.title: Draft Email for Manual Intervention (Failed Jobs)
mingghan_allocations.description: Prepare a draft email notification to the operations team detailing jobs that require manual intervention due to persistent failures.

mingghan_allocations.title: Draft Email for Manual Intervention (Abnormal Schedules)
mingghan_allocations.description: Prepare a draft email notification to the operations team regarding jobs with unresolvable schedule conflicts or other abnormalities requiring manual review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compile Scheduled Task Health Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Aggregate all relevant data, including job statuses, execution history, failure rates, and remediation actions, for the health report.

mingghan_allocations.title: Generate Scheduled Task Health Report Outline
mingghan_allocations.description: Create an outline or initial draft of the comprehensive scheduled task health report based on the compiled data.

updates.progress: Task successfully decomposed into 10 Mingghan-level subtasks.
updates.risks: None identified at this decomposition stage.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compile Scheduled Task Health Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Aggregate all relevant data, including job statuses, execution history, failure rates, and remediation actions, for the health report.

mingghan_allocations.title: Generate Scheduled Task Health Report Outline
mingghan_allocations.description: Create an outline or initial draft of the comprehensive scheduled task health report based on the compiled data.

ks.

The current successful decomposition at the `mingghan_level_execute` stage is a new, verified step in the Gated Pipeline strategy's effectiveness. This should be added to `Rule 1`. The constraint "English for future ICS fields" is directly related to the "遵循了英文标题和描述规范" (following English title and description norms) pattern already established and verified in `Rule 1` for other tasks (T36, T37, T40). Therefore, I will include this aspect in the new `mingghan_level_execute` entry for T42.

My plan is to use `file_patch` to insert the new entry under `Rule 1` after the existing `tumen_level_execute` entry for T42.

**Old content to match:**
```
        - **T42_scheduled_task_management-01**: `tumen_level_execute` 阶段成功将万户级任务分解为10个千户级子任务，涵盖调度任务状态检查、故障识别、知识库检索、任务修复（重启用、调整计划）、运维团队邮件通知（手动干预项）、以及健康报告的准备工作，验证了Gated Pipeline策略在复杂任务分解和层级流转中的有效性。
```

```
        - **T42_scheduled_task_management-01**: `mingghan_level_execute` 阶段成功将千户级任务分解为10个百户级子任务，并遵循了英文标题和描述规范，验证了Gated Pipeline策略在复杂任务分解和层级流转中的有效性。
```

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-01: List All Scheduled Jobs Status
jaghun_allocations.description: Use scheduler_list_jobs to get the current status of all scheduled jobs.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-02: Identify Failed Jobs
jaghun_allocations.description: Analyze job history to identify jobs that have failed recently.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-03: Identify Abnormal Jobs (e.g., disabled, long-running)
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify jobs that are disabled but should be active, or jobs showing abnormal runtime patterns.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-04: Search KB for Status Check Guides
jaghun_allocations.description: Use kb_search to find knowledge base articles related to checking scheduled job status and common issues.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-05: Re-enable Mistakenly Disabled Jobs
jaghun_allocations.description: Use scheduler_update_job to re-enable any jobs that were mistakenly disabled.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-06: Adjust Schedules to Avoid Conflicts
jaghun_allocations.description: Analyze job schedules and use scheduler_update_job to adjust cron expressions to prevent conflicts.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-07: Search KB for Troubleshooting Guides
jaghun_allocations.description: Use kb_search to find knowledge base articles for troubleshooting failed or abnormal scheduled tasks.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-08: Draft Email for Manual Intervention (Failed Tasks)
jaghun_allocations.description: Prepare an email draft for the ops team regarding failed tasks requiring manual intervention, including relevant job IDs and error details.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-09: Draft Email for Manual Intervention (Abnormal Tasks)
jaghun_allocations.description: Prepare an email draft for the ops team regarding abnormal tasks (e.g., conflicts, disabled tasks needing review) requiring manual intervention.

jaghun_allocations.title: Jaghun-10: Prepare Scheduled Task Health Report Outline
jaghun_allocations.description: Compile an outline for the final scheduled task health report, summarizing findings, fixes, and pending manual interventions.
